comment: Maria is an incredible guide! Her knowledge of Davao's culture and food scene made our trip unforgettable. She even surprised us with a visit to a hidden waterfall. Highly recommend!
Juan made our white water rafting experience absolutely thrilling! He knew exactly which rapids to hit for maximum fun while keeping everyone safe. Only wish the tour was longer!
Datu Kamlon's tour of T'boli village was the highlight of my Philippines trip. Learning about t'nalak weaving directly from the artisans was an honor. A truly authentic cultural experience.
Alyssa found us the perfect surf spots away from the crowds. Her local knowledge of Siargao is unmatched. Plus she took amazing photos of us surfing!
Beautiful craftsmanship on the T'nalak bag. You can tell it's genuinely handmade with love. The patterns are stunning and the quality is excellent.
